examples: Don't just head to class in your just your capris. Be sure to wear warm layers over your yoga outfit. A warm body is less prone to injury.
Ballet flats. These are my everyday shoes in the spring and summer. Wonderfully versatile-can be worn with pants, capris, shorts, skirts, and dresses.
